text: Teams shipping AI features fast are investing in evals before prompts. Prompt tweaks without eval baselines create random regressions.
author: dev_lead

text: Most backend incidents this quarter were not cloud outages but schema drift + weak migration rollback strategy.
author: infra_notes

text: If your PR cycle time is above 2 days, your architecture discussions are likely happening too late in the implementation phase.
author: eng_manager
